name: Dr. Sarah Jenkins
bio: Dr. Jenkins has over 15 years of experience in treating cardiovascular diseases and is a leading expert in preventive cardiology.

name: Dr. Michael Chen
bio: Specializing in neurological disorders, Dr. Chen brings a compassionate approach to treating migraines, epilepsy, and stroke recovery.

name: Dr. Emily Rodriguez
bio: Dr. Rodriguez is dedicated to the health and well-being of children, offering comprehensive care from infancy through adolescence.

name: Dr. James Wilson
bio: Expert in sports medicine and joint replacements, helping patients regain mobility and live pain-free lives.
